beIN SPORTS EN 2.desc_ar: Highlights from the Miami P1, held in Miami, USA, from 22–29 March. Staged at the Miami Beach Convention Center, this Premier Padel P1 event features men’s and women’s main-draw action through to the finals. As a P1 tournament, it offers 1,000 ranking points to the winners and a total prize fund of €479,068.

beIN SPORTS 2.desc_ar: Aston Villa have kept five consecutive home clean sheets against Italian clubs in major European competition – the last player to score at Villa Park for an Italian team was Zbigniew Boniek in a 2-1 Juventus win in the European Cup in March 1983. Since beating West Brom 3-1 at the Hawthorns in March 1967, Bologna have lost their five away visits to England in all European competition. They’ve lost to Leeds, Fulham, Liverpool  and Aston Villa twice.

beIN SPORTS 1.desc_ar: Bayern Munich’s victory in the first leg ended a nine-game winless run for them against Real Madrid in the UEFA Champions League. Only once before have they won both legs of a knockout stage tie against them in the European Cup/UEFA Champions League, doing so in the 2000-01 semi-finals. Since the start of the 2013-14 season, Real Madrid  have the joint-most away wins against Bayern Munich across all competitions, despite only playing there four times in this period.

This topic transcends generations, cultures, and nationalities, as fans passionately defend their favorites and recount unforgettable moments on the pitch. From legendary goal scorers to masterful playmakers, the players who have left an indelible mark on the game deserve recognition and celebration. " Football Legends" explore the remarkable careers and contributions of these iconic players who have shaped the beautiful game.
